title: Browserbase Skills Catalog
source_path_hint: README / official browser automation skills repo
market_signal: official source-owned GitHub repo
summary: Official Browserbase skill catalog page. The public repository describes Browserbase Skills as voice-activated browser automation skills for Browser Use and lists ready-made skills for search, browser traces, and prompt engineering.

market_signal: official skill folder visible in repo
summary: Official Browserbase `browser-trace` skill seed. Browserbase highlights browser traces as a core browser-use workflow for extracting and replaying real user browser actions.

summary: Official Browserbase `prompt-engineering` skill seed. Browserbase lists prompt engineering among its ready-made browser automation skills in the public source repo.
